zh.lifeSummary: 當Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol於1238年出生在義大利武丁阿奎利艾亞時，他的父親Meinhard I Count of Gorizia-Tyrol38歲，母親Adelheid of Tyrol26歲。他於1259年10月6日與Elisabeth von Bayern結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1295年11月1日在奧地利亞特斯皮塔爾 安 德 德勞斯皮塔爾 安 德 德勞享年57歲，埋葬在奧地利提洛爾易姆斯特斯塔姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol于1238年出生在意大利武丁阿奎利艾亞时，他的父亲Meinhard I Count of Gorizia-Tyrol38岁，母亲Adelheid of Tyrol26岁。他于1259年10月6日与Elisabeth von Bayern结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1295年11月1日在奥地利亞特斯皮塔爾 安 德 德勞斯皮塔爾 安 德 德勞享年57岁，埋葬在奥地利提洛爾易姆斯特斯塔姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Görtz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German (mainly Götz) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Götz): from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound names with the first element gōd ‘good’ or god, got ‘god’. Compare Getts and Gotz .

variants.name: Goetze
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Fritz, Hans, Hartmann, Helmut, Klaus, Rainer, Wilhelm.  Scandinavian Erik.
German (Götze): variant of Goetz .

variants.name: Getz
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Götz (see Goetz ). Compare Getts .

variants.name: Gutz
meanings: East German: variant of Götz (see Goetz ).

variants.name: Goetzke
meanings: East German (Götzke): from a pet form of Goetz + the Slavic suffix -k.

variants.name: Goetzman
meanings: Americanized form of South German Götzmann:
variant of Götz (see Goetz ).
from late Middle High German gotesman ‘man of God’, hence a nickname for a particularly pious person, or perhaps for someone who worked in a church.

variants.name: Getts
meanings: Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Getz or German Götz (see Goetz ).

variants.name: Gatts
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of German Götz (see Goetz ).

variants.name: Gotz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Manfred, Otto, Viktor.
South German (almost exclusively Götz) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; Götz): variant of Goetz .

nameMeanings.name: Meinhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from magin ‘strength’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol was born in 1238, in Aquiléia, Udine, Italy, his father, Meinhard I Count of Gorizia-Tyrol, was 38 and his mother, Adelheid of Tyrol, was 26. He married Elisabeth von Bayern on 6 October 1259. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 November 1295, in Spittal an der Drau, Spittal an der Drau, Carinthia, Austria, at the age of 57, and was buried in Stams, Imst, Tirol, Austria.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol est né en 1238, à Aquiléia, Udine, Italie, son père, Meinhard I Count of Gorizia-Tyrol, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Adelheid of Tyrol, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth von Bayern le 6 octobre 1259. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 novembre 1295, à Spittal an der Drau, Spittal an der Drau, Kärnten, Autriche, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Stams, Imst, Tirol, Autriche.

de.lifeSummary: Als Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol 1238 in Aquileja, Udine, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Meinhard I Count of Gorizia-Tyrol 38 und seine Mutter Adelheid of Tyrol 26. Er hat am 6. Oktober 1259 Elisabeth von Bayern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. November 1295 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Spittal an der Drau, Spittal an der Drau, Kärnten, Österreich und wurde in Stams, Imst, Tirol, Österreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol è nato il nel 1238 nel Aquiléia, Udine, Italia, il suo padre, Meinhard I Count of Gorizia-Tyrol, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid of Tyrol, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth von Bayern il 6 ottobre 1259. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 novembre 1295, nel Spittal an der Drau, Spittal an der Drau, Carinzia, Austria, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Stams, Imst, Tirolo, Austria.

ja.lifeSummary: Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirolが1238年にイタリアウディンアクイルeアで生まれた時，父Meinhard I Count of Gorizia-Tyrolは38歳，母Adelheid of Tyrolは26歳であった。1259年10月6日にElisabeth von Bayernと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1295年11月1日にオーストリアクaルンテンスパッタル アン ダー ドラウスパッタル アン ダー ドラウで57歳で死去し，オーストリアティロルイムストスタムズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol(이)가 1238년 이탈리아 우딘 아키e이아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Meinhard I Count of Gorizia-Tyrol(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid of Tyrol(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1259년 10월 6일 Elisabeth von Bayern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1295년 11월 1일 오스트리아 ka른텐 스피탤 앤 데르 드라 스피탤 앤 데르 드라에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트리아 티럴 임스트 스탬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol nasceu em 1238, em Aquiléia, Udine, Itália, seu pai, Meinhard I Count of Gorizia-Tyrol, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid of Tyrol, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth von Bayern em 6 de outubro de 1259. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1295, em Spittal an der Drau, Spittal an der Drau, Kärnten, Áustria, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Stams, Imst, Tirol, Áustria.

ru.of,,Aquileja,Friuli-Venezia-,Italy: акуилeя, удаин, фрюли винезя гюля, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol родился в 1238 г. в местности акуилeя, удаин, Италия, его отцу по имени Meinhard I Count of Gorizia-Tyrol было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid of Tyrol, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth von Bayern 6 октября 1259 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 ноября 1295 г. в местности спитталь ан дир драу, спитталь ан дир драу, кaрнтен, Австрия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности стамс, имст, тирол, Австрия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol nació en 1238, en Aquiléia, Udine, Italia, su papá, Meinhard I Count of Gorizia-Tyrol, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Adelheid of Tyrol, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elisabeth von Bayern el 6 de octubre de 1259. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de noviembre de 1295, en Spittal an der Drau, Spittal an der Drau, Kärnten, Austria, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Stams, Imst, Tirol, Austria.
